title: berlindetoi
author: Gabrielle Charpentier
description: Being heard in a world that rushes berlindetoi is a trilingual podcast recorded in French, German and English, exploring conversations with people living and working in Berlin. Through long-form conversations, berlindetoi takes the time to slow down and listen to the paths people build, the choices they make, and the way they navigate life, work and change. Hosted by Gabrielle Charpentier, berlindetoi is an open space for thoughtful conversations from Berlin.
